name: Event Timeline App Visual Redesign - iOS Journal Topic Text Width v27
note: This is a Figma reconstruction handoff file, not a native .fig source. This version aligns the My Following date with the latest-update summary box by rendered layout, removes preparing wording in the following-list preparing card, removes the normal right action lane, and gives the title, summary, and latest update more width. It preserves recommendation swipe behavior, copy, business rules, and semantic colors.

topicCard.dateAlignment: same row as latest-update summary box, measured after layout
